title: Treasure Fiends
description: A mod that adds treasure-bearing mobs!
body:
Loot Fiends!



What Are They?

-Fiends are various mobs scattered across the world, each with unique loot and goals!

-Upon finding one and hunting it down, you'll be rewarded with awesome loot!



How to Find One?

-Fiends can be found almost anywhere! They're quite a rare spawn, so theres a tool that can help!

Fiend Finder

![Fiend Finder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11b009080da1f0223bf43961b4adb9efd0e1660c.png)
![Fiend Finder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17614a3a0226100c9d370fc46e062855ff629025.png)


-The fiend finder, upon right-clicking, will show any nearby fiends! Be careful, though, it only has 12 uses! However, if there aren't any, don't worry! If there's no fiends nearby, it won't use durability.


- If you run low on durability, the Fiend Finder can be repaired in a crafting bench with a block of gold! It will ALWAYS replenish the full durability.

Fiend Types
Treasure Fiends

![Treasure Fiend](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c20473e72a3149e48f782a201ea847879830d61.png)
- Treasure Fiends are elusive little critters! They hide in dark caves with the treasure they've found laying around, and sometimes come out on the surface at night to find rare items!

- After finding one and slaying it, you'll be rewarded with amazing goodies! Along with this, they drop a lot of XP!



Thieving Fiends


- Thieving fiends are passive mobs that contain goodies!

- They're sneaky thieves, so you can lure them out with a Mysterious Bag!

![Thieving Fiend](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17227af391bf4f757fdc941c2a42b6db671771dc.png)



How to Find One?

-Thieving fiends can rarely be seen sneaking around villages trying to snag loot! Alternatively, you can craft a Mysterious Bag (Shown below).

-After crafting the bag, place it down and wait about 30-35 seconds. After which, a thieving fiend will appear, stealing the bag!

-Hunt the fiend down and slay it to be rewarded with extra goodies!

![Mysterious Bag Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/918ecc41159ab2ee1aae07649201fc1bc1647757.png)
![Mysterious Bag Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15793c9121528754cd2d7e2e020a2d78cdc7d66c.gif)



Mean Fiends & Key Fiends

![Mean Fiend & Key Fiend](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c270aaa17b9ab012111fed738b00be60c857c35.png)

- Mean Fiends are aggressive, lonely brutes that lurk in the caves. Due to such loneliness, they've become bitter enough to capture Key Fiends, the purest Fiend! 

- Defeat a Mean Fiend to make it drop a Key Fiend!

- Key Fiends are shy and docile creatures, capable of no harm! However, they are a mgical source! Upon defeating a Mean Fiend, a 15 Second timer will start. If you don't catch the Key Fiend in time, it'll disappear without a trace!

Flower Fiends

- Flower Fiends are curious, passive little flower buds that can be tamed with bonemeal!

- Flower Fiends all spawn in Flower Forests, but each color has a unique biome spawn as well!

- Using honey or honeycombs, Flower Fiends can provide buffs! Honey provides a longer buff than honeycombs!

### Pink Flower = Regeneration, Cherry Grove
### Red Flower = Strength, Forest
### Blue Flower = Night Vision, Swamp
### White Flower = Speed, Birch Forest
![Flower Fiends](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b0796aab6a263424f51b3817bf180b3d2bc4232.png)

Treasure Chests

- If you're quick enough to capture a Key Fiend, then you can use it to unlock lost treasure! Simply right click on the chest holding the Key Fiend, and watch the magic!

- Treasure Chest ruins can spawn all around the world, from Y-Level -45 to 64. Find one and receive valuable loot!

![Treasure Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a12bc73cd1761c805b4f10741710c90b1cab496a.png)



REQUIRES GECKOLIB
